name: clikit-plugin
description: OpenCode plugin — 7 agents, 14 commands, 26 skills, 11 hooks

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && cp src/clikit.schema.json dist/clikit.schema.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.postpublish: rm -rf ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/clikit-plugin && rm -f ~/.cache/opencode/bun.lock && echo '✓ Cleared OpenCode plugin cache — next start will install fresh'
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run build

author: Kira
